description_long: This vehicle is a futuristic, angular combat tactical aircraft with a sleek, bat-like silhouette and a low, wide profile. Its body is predominantly dark gray with subtle olive undertones, featuring sharply pointed wings that extend outward and slightly backward. The front section is equipped with a faceted, armored nose and several vent-like structures, while the rear houses two large, rectangular exhaust ports. The surface is adorned with a few yellow-green highlights and a prominent white insignia on the side of the fuselage. The overall design suggests heavy armor and advanced aerodynamics, with no visible wheels or landing gear, indicating it is likely a flying vehicle. The structure appears robust, with reinforced panels and minimal surface ornamentation aside from the insignia.
description: A dark, angular combat aircraft with wide, pointed wings, armored body, and prominent rear exhausts, featuring a white insignia and yellow-green highlights.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, central cockpit area, and wide, angular wings with vent-like details.
description_view_1: Left-front angled view highlights the sharp wing edges, faceted nose, and the white insignia on the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the two large rectangular exhaust ports and the tail fin, with the wings extending outward.
description_view_3: Right-front angled view mirrors the left, showing the insignia and the aerodynamic wing structure.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body appears to be covered in thick, angular armor plating with sloped surfaces and reinforced panels, especially around the nose and cockpit.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark gray with subtle olive undertones and yellow-green highlights; no distinct camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: White insignia on the side of the fuselage.
